component.name: Control Center
component.summary: Linux System Change & Activity Timeline Viewer

description.p: Control Center presents a unified timeline of meaningful system changes, turning logs and events into an understandable narrative of what happened on your Linux system.

ul.li: Unified Timeline: Aggregate events from journald, package managers, and kernel
Smart Filtering: Preset filters for "Since Last Reboot", "Warnings & Errors", "Changes Only"
Correlation Engine: Rule-based grouping of related events with transparent reasoning
Human-Readable Summaries: Clear explanations with expandable raw evidence

description.p: Introduces the new Security Posture page with firewall, MAC policy, Secure Boot, SSH exposure, privileged access, and Flatpak permission insights, plus snapshot comparison support for security changes.
Internationalization support for 8 languages. Performance optimizations with async data loading. System diagnostics page. Codebase cleanup and bug fixes.
